# AI Engineering Orchestration Packet Template

Use this packet when coordinating an AI Engineering workflow across specialist desks.

```yaml
workflow_mode:
stage_sequence:
current_stage:
completed_stages:
skipped_stages:
capability_id:
user_goal:
target_outcome:
risk_tier:
approval_state:
source_facts:
evidence_links:
decisions:
assumptions:
open_questions:
validation_gates:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
implementation_scope:
allowed_files:
forbidden_files:
validation_commands:
report_out_path:
stop_line:
```
